title: Source provider registry and OpenAlex discovery proof
problem: ticket-138 added a Phase 3 discover-sources stub CLI. Operators need the first real API-first source discovery path: a provider registry and OpenAlex metadata discovery with network opt-in, mocked deterministic tests, and structured candidate metadata output only (no ingest/fetch/extract yet).
acceptance_criteria: Provider registry exists with provider id, health check, and discover(query, domain_pack, limit).
OpenAlex provider configured via env (OPENALEX_MAILTO optional polite contact; no secrets printed).
discover-sources --provider openalex --query returns structured candidate metadata from mocked OpenAlex response in tests.
Network blocked unless RGE_ALLOW_SOURCE_NETWORK=1; missing opt-in returns structured blocked JSON.
Missing/invalid config returns structured JSON, not stack traces.
Unit tests mock HTTP; no network in CI/golden.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
No DB writes, ingest, fetch, claim extraction, public export/site changes.
non_goals: Claim extraction or NM-4 evidence DB writes.
Schema migrations or candidate-source staging tables.
rollback_plan: Remove source_providers package and revert discover-sources to stub-only path behind feature flag.
